description: Small labeled set for the A2.P2 multi_query=true recall-lift eval. Each query lists a few KNOWN-RELEVANT DOIs/ids that an ideal search should surface in the top-20. These are illustrative anchors, not an exhaustive gold set; recall@20 is a relative lift signal (multi-query off vs on), not an absolute benchmark. Multi-query helps most where a single lexical phrasing misses synonym-/framing-diverse records — these queries lean that way. Update ids as the upstream corpora evolve.

queries.query: single-cell RNA sequencing of human liver
ChIP-seq of breast cancer cell lines
small RNA sequencing in Phelipanche aegyptiaca
hippocampal place cells and spatial memory in mice
protein structure datasets from the PDB for machine learning
